title: Kenyan-Style Chicken Bake
description: A flavorful and aromatic chicken dish inspired by Kenyan cuisine, featuring a blend of nutty and leafy spices.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together the nutty spice blend, chopped pandan leaves, salt, and black pepper.
Season the chicken breast with the spice mixture, making sure to coat it evenly.
Heat the olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat. Sear the chicken breast until browned on both sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
While the chicken is baking, heat the chopped onion and minced garlic in a separate skillet over medium heat until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Once the chicken is done, remove it from the oven and let it rest for a few minutes before slicing.
Serve the sliced chicken with the sautéed onion and garlic mixture spooned over the top.
